chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Hello friends, Welcome to Gate Smashers.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: In this video we are starting lecture 1 of TOC, that is Theory of Computation.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: In lecture 1 of TOC, first of all I want to tell you why we are studying Theory of Computation.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Because we are talking about computation in theoretical way.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: But computer science totally deals with practical.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Whenever we want to talk about application, whether you talk about Android application,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: iOS application, we always talk about it.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Even students say that sir we always talk about practical here,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: that we have to write program in C, write program in Java, write in Python.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So what is the purpose of this theory here?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So see what is the purpose of theory?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Behind every implementation is theory.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: First of all we talk about theory because theory completes you, theory tells you concept.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Theory tells you principle of that particular thing.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Means behind this thing, any implementation has happened.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: See if we talk about implementation in today's time, like atom bomb,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: already its implementation has been done, so many nuclear bombs have already been made.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: But see, did they become direct nuclear bombs? No.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Behind this is first theory, Newton's law, E is equal to mc square.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: This is a simple equation, by refining it further, by doing so much practical on it,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: they have created a nuclear weapon.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So see, if we talk about TOC, theory of computation, means we want to understand computation,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: how our computer system works, to understand that we will make a mathematical model,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: we will make a mathematical, an abstract model, that is what we call theory of computation.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: And the three pillars of theory of computation, means if you want to understand theory of computation,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: then I am starting from three pillars here, those three pillars are leg.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Leg means not leg like LEG, but LAG.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: And what is the meaning of LAG? First of all we will talk about language here,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: then we will talk about automata here, and then third we will talk about grammar here.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: If you clear all three points, then means you will clear the entire TOC.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So let's start here, first of all from L, that is language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So the story of language starts, the smallest unit, see obviously language,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: what comes to mind first after hearing, Hindi language, English language, Punjabi language,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: but we will reach on language later, this is the end of the story.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: What is the start of the story? The start of the story is symbol.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Yes, that is the building block of the language, the smallest unit of the language is what?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: The symbol. Now what comes in symbol? Like your A, B, C, D, all these are symbols.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: 0, 1, 2, 3, all these are your symbols. So all these symbols make a building block of a particular language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So the story of your story starts from this symbol. So you should know first of all,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: which symbols come in whichever language you are talking about.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: After symbols, we talk about alphabet here. Alphabet, which we denote by sigma.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Yes, alphabet, sigma, this notation will be seen most in TOC, that is a sigma.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now what is alphabet? Finite set of symbols. What does finite set of symbols mean?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: See, I will tell you the first important point, because in all the videos I am bringing,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: in these videos, parallelly I will tell you all those points,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: which in competitive exams, even in your college or university level exams, can ask you.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So the first important point here is alphabet. What is alphabet? Finite set of symbols.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Yes. Can it be infinite? No. It is always a finite set of symbols.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Like I gave you, sigma is equal to A, B. Means now you have to write all those points,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: you have to make all those words, which are strong by combining A and B.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: And this will always be given to you. Alphabet will always be given to you.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Otherwise, obviously, you can pick any symbol. And if you can pick any symbol,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: then you can make any alphabet. And after alphabet, if we talk about string,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: because the next concept comes is string. Now what is string here? Collection of alphabets.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: What can you say? Sequence. What is a better word? Sequence of alphabet.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Like if I give you sigma, let's say sigma is equal to A, B. Means if I give you alphabet A and B,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: then see which string can be made. What is the meaning of string?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Like A itself is a string, B itself is a string, AA is one of the string, AB, BA, BB,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: all these are a kind of string. Now string has a property here.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: What is string? First of all, we talk about length of the string.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: What is the meaning of length of the string? How many words can come in the string?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: How many symbols can come? Let's suppose if I talk, length of the string is 2.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: If I tell you length of the string is 2 and our alphabet is A also,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: then which all will you make? What all will be in that string?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: You can have AA, AB, BA, BB. You will have like this.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Let's say length of 3. In length of 3 what can you have?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: AAA, AAB, ABA, ABB, BAA, BAB, BBA, BBB.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Means what can be this? Possible strings can be there.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now if we talk about the length of the string, then see how much is the length here?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: There is 2, there is 3, total number of strings you can find out here.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now what is the meaning of string? Like if we talk about English word,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: then see in alphabet English, obviously which symbols are there?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: We have symbols A to Z. Now what is the meaning of alphabet?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Let's suppose you have to write all the strings, you have to write all the sentences,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: but in those sentences you have to use only A, B, C and D.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Means I have fixed the alphabet that it should be made from these 4 only.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now what will you write? You will try to write sentence or you will try to write words,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: so what can you say about those words or sentences?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: You are a string in a way, which is a sequence in a way,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: all the symbols, all the alphabets given to you, they have a sequence in a way.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now first of all the symbol is done, alphabet, then we come to the string,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: after string we come to language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: What is the meaning of language? That is the biggest term,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: what is the meaning of language? Collection of all the possible strings.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Collection of strings. Like English is a language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now in English language you can say collection of all strings.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Collection of all strings means all the sentences, all the words collection

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: you can say in a way language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: And if we talk about programming way, like if we talk about C program,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: so what is the meaning of C program? If you have a question, write a C program.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now what is write a C program actually? It is a string in a way.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: You are writing a program, let's say sum of two numbers.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now if you are writing a program of sum of two numbers,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: that means you are writing a string.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: In a way you are writing a paragraph in English.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: But what is the meaning of language? Collection of all C program.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Means all the C programs exist, valid C programs,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: you can say their collection as language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So now we start with an example here, all the points.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So first of all what is given to us here?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: First of all in the question we are given sigma.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: What do we have in sigma? Sigma is A and B.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Means we have only two alphabets A and B.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So see, now if you are asked language here,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: now what is language? Collection of string.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now let's say, I will tell you the language,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: you have to write down a language L1, and language L1 is what?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Collection of all strings of length 3.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now see what we have written here? AAA.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now what is this AA? It is one of the string.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now what is ABA? It is one of the string.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: This is also a string, this is also a string,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: what are all these? One string.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now what can I say about their whole collection?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: This whole collection is a kind of language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now if you want all the strings of length 3 in the language,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: then you can say this is language L1.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Because what is this one AAA? One of the string.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: One of the possible string.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Because what is string? Sequence of a number, sequence of alphabet.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So what is all this AAA, ABB?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: You have one language whose length is 3.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now such a language is not necessary that it will be finite or infinite.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now see how many strings came in length of 3?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: How many strings came in this language?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So 8 number of strings came in this language L1.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now what can you call this? Finite or infinite?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Obviously, what is this? It is a finite language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: But the language can be infinite also.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: How? How can it be infinite?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Let's suppose if we say you have to write a language

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: in which all the strings should start with A and with A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: In this way you should be told that you have to write that language,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: in that language all the strings should start with A and with A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now start with A and end with A means

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: alphabet is A and B.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Alphabet is fixed, A and B.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now you can take any, A, B, C.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: But your work will be done with A and B.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So see start with A and end with A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: One of the possible is this.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: What can be the second? Start with A and end with A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So see this is also start with A and end with A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: What else can be? A, A, A, A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So see in this way your infinite number of strings are possible.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: And apart from this we have possible,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: let's suppose A, B, A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: This is also one of the possible strings.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: See start with A and end with A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Apart from this we have A, B, B, A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: A, B, B, B, A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So see all these are infinite strings.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: And obviously it is becoming infinite.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So my language will also become infinite.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So if you are getting in question that language should be finite.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So you can say like this example is

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: that is string, all the strings of length 3.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: All the strings of length 2.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: All the strings of length 1.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Even all the strings of length 0.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Length 0 can also be.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Length 0 means that there is no option here.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Means neither A should be there nor B should be there.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Which you can take as Sigma power 0.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Now Sigma power 0 means that

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: no string should come here.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So what do we call it?

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: We call it Epsilon here.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: And all these points are important.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Related to language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Because on language you can ask

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: that language can be finite, it can be infinite.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So yes it can be finite

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: and it can also be infinite.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Apart from this you can take any example here.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Like string of all the possible strings

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: of consecutive A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Starting with only A.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: Starting with A, ending with B.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: All these are examples of infinite language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: And if we fix that length should be 2,

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: You can say that these are examples of finite language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So this is all about the basic points of language.

chunks.title: Introduction to TOC What is Language in TOC with Examples in Hindi 480p
chunks.text: So in the next video we will start

text: Hello friends, Welcome to Gate Smashers. In this video we are starting lecture 1 of TOC, that is Theory of Computation. In lecture 1 of TOC, first of all I want to tell you why we are studying Theory of Computation. Because we are talking about computation in theoretical way. But computer science totally deals with practical. Whenever we want to talk about application, whether you talk about Android application, iOS application, we always talk about it. Even students say that sir we always talk about practical here, that we have to write program in C, write program in Java, write in Python. So what is the purpose of this theory here? So see what is the purpose of theory? Behind every implementation is theory. First of all we talk about theory because theory completes you, theory tells you concept. Theory tells you principle of that particular thing. Means behind this thing, any implementation has happened. See if we talk about implementation in today's time, like atom bomb, already its implementation has been done, so many nuclear bombs have already been made. But see, did they become direct nuclear bombs? No. Behind this is first theory, Newton's law, E is equal to mc square. This is a simple equation, by refining it further, by doing so much practical on it, they have created a nuclear weapon. So see, if we talk about TOC, theory of computation, means we want to understand computation, how our computer system works, to understand that we will make a mathematical model, we will make a mathematical, an abstract model, that is what we call theory of computation. And the three pillars of theory of computation, means if you want to understand theory of computation, then I am starting from three pillars here, those three pillars are leg. Leg means not leg like LEG, but LAG. And what is the meaning of LAG? First of all we will talk about language here, then we will talk about automata here, and then third we will talk about grammar here. If you clear all three points, then means you will clear the entire TOC. So let's start here, first of all from L, that is language. So the story of language starts, the smallest unit, see obviously language, what comes to mind first after hearing, Hindi language, English language, Punjabi language, but we will reach on language later, this is the end of the story. What is the start of the story? The start of the story is symbol. Yes, that is the building block of the language, the smallest unit of the language is what? The symbol. Now what comes in symbol? Like your A, B, C, D, all these are symbols. 0, 1, 2, 3, all these are your symbols. So all these symbols make a building block of a particular language. So the story of your story starts from this symbol. So you should know first of all, which symbols come in whichever language you are talking about. After symbols, we talk about alphabet here. Alphabet, which we denote by sigma. Yes, alphabet, sigma, this notation will be seen most in TOC, that is a sigma. Now what is alphabet? Finite set of symbols. What does finite set of symbols mean? See, I will tell you the first important point, because in all the videos I am bringing, in these videos, parallelly I will tell you all those points, which in competitive exams, even in your college or university level exams, can ask you. So the first important point here is alphabet. What is alphabet? Finite set of symbols. Yes. Can it be infinite? No. It is always a finite set of symbols. Like I gave you, sigma is equal to A, B. Means now you have to write all those points, you have to make all those words, which are strong by combining A and B. And this will always be given to you. Alphabet will always be given to you. Otherwise, obviously, you can pick any symbol. And if you can pick any symbol, then you can make any alphabet. And after alphabet, if we talk about string, because the next concept comes is string. Now what is string here? Collection of alphabets. What can you say? Sequence. What is a better word? Sequence of alphabet. Like if I give you sigma, let's say sigma is equal to A, B. Means if I give you alphabet A and B, then see which string can be made. What is the meaning of string? Like A itself is a string, B itself is a string, AA is one of the string, AB, BA, BB, all these are a kind of string. Now string has a property here. What is string? First of all, we talk about length of the string. What is the meaning of length of the string? How many words can come in the string? How many symbols can come? Let's suppose if I talk, length of the string is 2. If I tell you length of the string is 2 and our alphabet is A also, then which all will you make? What all will be in that string? You can have AA, AB, BA, BB. You will have like this. Let's say length of 3. In length of 3 what can you have? AAA, AAB, ABA, ABB, BAA, BAB, BBA, BBB. Means what can be this? Possible strings can be there. Now if we talk about the length of the string, then see how much is the length here? There is 2, there is 3, total number of strings you can find out here. Now what is the meaning of string? Like if we talk about English word, then see in alphabet English, obviously which symbols are there? We have symbols A to Z. Now what is the meaning of alphabet? Let's suppose you have to write all the strings, you have to write all the sentences, but in those sentences you have to use only A, B, C and D. Means I have fixed the alphabet that it should be made from these 4 only. Now what will you write? You will try to write sentence or you will try to write words, so what can you say about those words or sentences? You are a string in a way, which is a sequence in a way, all the symbols, all the alphabets given to you, they have a sequence in a way. Now first of all the symbol is done, alphabet, then we come to the string, after string we come to language. What is the meaning of language? That is the biggest term, what is the meaning of language? Collection of all the possible strings. Collection of strings. Like English is a language. Now in English language you can say collection of all strings. Collection of all strings means all the sentences, all the words collection you can say in a way language. And if we talk about programming way, like if we talk about C program, so what is the meaning of C program? If you have a question, write a C program. Now what is write a C program actually? It is a string in a way. You are writing a program, let's say sum of two numbers. Now if you are writing a program of sum of two numbers, that means you are writing a string. In a way you are writing a paragraph in English. But what is the meaning of language? Collection of all C program. Means all the C programs exist, valid C programs, you can say their collection as language. So now we start with an example here, all the points. So first of all what is given to us here? First of all in the question we are given sigma. What do we have in sigma? Sigma is A and B. Means we have only two alphabets A and B. So see, now if you are asked language here, now what is language? Collection of string. Now let's say, I will tell you the language, you have to write down a language L1, and language L1 is what? Collection of all strings of length 3. Now see what we have written here? AAA. Now what is this AA? It is one of the string. Now what is ABA? It is one of the string. This is also a string, this is also a string, what are all these? One string. Now what can I say about their whole collection? This whole collection is a kind of language. Now if you want all the strings of length 3 in the language, then you can say this is language L1. Because what is this one AAA? One of the string. One of the possible string. Because what is string? Sequence of a number, sequence of alphabet. So what is all this AAA, ABB? You have one language whose length is 3. Now such a language is not necessary that it will be finite or infinite. Now see how many strings came in length of 3? How many strings came in this language? 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8. So 8 number of strings came in this language L1. Now what can you call this? Finite or infinite? Obviously, what is this? It is a finite language. But the language can be infinite also. How? How can it be infinite? Let's suppose if we say you have to write a language in which all the strings should start with A and with A. In this way you should be told that you have to write that language, in that language all the strings should start with A and with A. Now start with A and end with A means alphabet is A and B. Alphabet is fixed, A and B. Now you can take any, A, B, C. But your work will be done with A and B. So see start with A and end with A. One of the possible is this. What can be the second? Start with A and end with A. So see this is also start with A and end with A. What else can be? A, A, A, A. So see in this way your infinite number of strings are possible. And apart from this we have possible, let's suppose A, B, A. This is also one of the possible strings. See start with A and end with A. Apart from this we have A, B, B, A. A, B, B, B, A. So see all these are infinite strings. And obviously it is becoming infinite. So my language will also become infinite. So if you are getting in question that language should be finite. So you can say like this example is that is string, all the strings of length 3. All the strings of length 2. All the strings of length 1. Even all the strings of length 0. Length 0 can also be. Length 0 means that there is no option here. Means neither A should be there nor B should be there. Which you can take as Sigma power 0. Now Sigma power 0 means that no string should come here. So what do we call it? We call it Epsilon here. And all these points are important. Related to language. Because on language you can ask that language can be finite, it can be infinite. So yes it can be finite and it can also be infinite. Apart from this you can take any example here. Like string of all the possible strings of consecutive A. Starting with only A. Starting with A, ending with B. All these are examples of infinite language. And if we fix that length should be 2, 3, 4. You can say that these are examples of finite language. So this is all about the basic points of language. So in the next video we will start related to Automata. And all these videos are linked. You have to check one by one. Because if you don't check all these points, if you don't note down all these points, then you will not understand TOC in this way. Thank you. Thank you.
